Regions of Africa

Start with a region, then narrow into the right country and destination

The new frontend structure is organized around traveler decision-making. Regions now act as the first layer before country-level comparison and destination-level planning.

5 Regions
18 Countries

How to use this page

Think broad first, specific second

Use regions to understand travel style and route logic, then move into countries like Uganda and Kenya before opening individual destination pages with practical planning details.

Reset
Showing 5 regions
4 countries

East Africa

World-class wildlife migrations, gorilla trekking, rift valley landscapes, and the easiest first step into an Africa safari journey.

Why start here

Best launch region for first-time safari planning, gorilla trekking, and high-recognition destinations.

Countries in this region

  • Uganda
  • Kenya
  • Tanzania
  • Rwanda
Open destinations Compare tours Browse stays
4 countries

Southern Africa

Classic safari country with big-game reserves, dramatic waterfalls, road-trip deserts, and strong city-plus-wildlife combinations.

Why start here

Useful once the traveler knows their preferred route style, pacing, and experience mix.

Countries in this region

  • South Africa
  • Botswana
  • Zimbabwe
  • Namibia
Open destinations Compare tours Browse stays
3 countries

North Africa

Imperial cities, Sahara-edge routes, Mediterranean coastlines, and ancient heritage from Morocco to Egypt.

Why start here

Useful once the traveler knows their preferred route style, pacing, and experience mix.

Countries in this region

  • Morocco
  • Egypt
  • Tunisia
Open destinations Compare tours Browse stays
4 countries

West Africa

Atlantic energy, heritage coastlines, music cities, sacred forests, and warm community-led experiences.

Why start here

Useful once the traveler knows their preferred route style, pacing, and experience mix.

Countries in this region

  • Senegal
  • Ghana
  • Nigeria
  • Sierra Leone
Open destinations Compare tours Browse stays
4 countries

Central Africa

Rainforest expeditions, gorilla tracking, and deeply rooted indigenous traditions.

Why start here

Useful once the traveler knows their preferred route style, pacing, and experience mix.

Countries in this region

  • Rwanda
  • Cameroon
  • Gabon
  • DR Congo
Open destinations Compare tours Browse stays

Trek Africa Guide

A minimalist but comprehensive Africa travel directory built to help travelers discover where to go, what to do, where to stay, and where to eat before they book with verified partners.
